option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# Online-Course-Enrollment
Java implementation of an online course enrollment system, now with a JavaFX desktop frontend.
## Features - Register students - Add and list courses - Enroll a student in a course - Drop selected enrollments - Persist students, courses, and enrollments in local text files
## Project Layout - `Javasrc/src/model` - domain models - `Javasrc/src/service` - business logic - `Javasrc/src/repository` - file persistence - `Javasrc/src/ui` - JavaFX application, controller, and views
## Run the JavaFX App From `Javasrc/`:
```bash mvn clean javafx:run ```
## Notes - Data files are created in the same working directory (`students.txt`, `courses.txt`, `enrollments.txt`). - Existing console entry point is still available in `Javasrc/src/Main.java`.
